# Configuration format version 26.3 revision 0
configure {
    system {
        name "bgp-type-and-inheritance"
    }
    policy-options {
        prefix-list "pfx" {
            prefix 10.0.0.0/8 type through {
            }
        }
        policy-statement "imp" {
            default-action {
                action-type accept
            }
        }
    }
    router "Base" {
        autonomous-system 65001
        interface "system" {
            ipv4 {
                primary {
                    address 1.1.1.1
                    prefix-length 32
                }
            }
        }
        bgp {
            group "g" {
                type external
                peer-as 65002
                import {
                    policy ["imp"]
                }
            }
            neighbor "10.0.0.1" {
                group "g"
            }
        }
    }
}
